html:
2026-0607
2026-06-12TCTransportation of Dangerous Goods Act, 1992Regulations Amending the Transportation of Dangerous Goods Regulations (Canadian Update)Regulations Amending the Transportation of Dangerous Goods Regulations (Canadian Update) in order to (1) bring several modifications and updates to existing requirements and promote consistency, and uniform interpretation; (2) reduce the number of equivalency certificates (ECs) issued by Transport Canada under the authority of the Act by incorporating new regulatory provisions that cover activities currently permitted through ECs; (3) update existing requirements for rail transportation to better align the Canadian buffer car rules with the US regulations; and (4) harmonize the regulations with the Packaging and Transport of Nuclear Substances Regulations, 2015, regarding the transportation of radioactive materials of unknown classification back to the consignors for characterization.Registration: SOR/2026-0127 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Regulations Amending the Transportation of Dangerous Goods Regulations (Canadian Update)
precis: Regulations Amending the Transportation of Dangerous Goods Regulations (Canadian Update) in order to (1) bring several modifications and updates to existing requirements and promote consistency, and uniform interpretation; (2) reduce the number of equivalency certificates (ECs) issued by Transport Canada under the authority of the Act by incorporating new regulatory provisions that cover activities currently permitted through ECs; (3) update existing requirements for rail transportation to better align the Canadian buffer car rules with the US regulations; and (4) harmonize the regulations with the Packaging and Transport of Nuclear Substances Regulations, 2015, regarding the transportation of radioactive materials of unknown classification back to the consignors for characterization.
